description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow set within a spacious, landscaped compound surrounded by a perimeter of tall trees and hedges. The main building features a flat roof, clean lines, and multiple interconnected sections, with several outdoor patios and covered walkways. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, a swimming pool area with lounge seating, and numerous palm trees and decorative plants throughout the grounds. The bungalow is predominantly white with some gray and brown accents, and large windows are distributed across the facade, allowing for ample natural light. The layout is open and expansive, with clear zones for living, recreation, and vehicle access. The overall design emphasizes privacy, luxury, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow in a landscaped compound with a pool, garage, and abundant greenery. The structure is spacious, white, and features large windows and multiple outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an elevated corner, highlighting the main building, driveway, and the lush landscaping with palm trees and a pool area in the back.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a frontal perspective, emphasizing the entrance, garage, and the symmetrical arrangement of trees and hedges along the perimeter.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the bungalow, focusing on the pool area, outdoor seating, and the extensive garden space.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a view from the opposite corner, showcasing the garage, driveway, and the interconnected sections of the bungalow with visible patios and walkways.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
